key_dungeons.name: Iron Lair
key_dungeons.description: A narrow crevice leads into Iron Lair. The sound of dripping water echoes endlessly below.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Search Iron Lair for the hidden Sapphire Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: Rumors say it was sealed away behind deadly traps.

game_log: Welcome to Ashford!
Elder Sybil: Listen well — the Iron Lair holds a powerful artifact. Rumors say it was sealed away behind deadly traps.
Elder Sybil: Will you seek it out and bring it back to save us?
Elder Sybil: Thank you, brave souls! I've marked the locations on your map. Be careful out there!
The party defeated Dark Coven.
You descend into Iron Lair - Floor 1... No torch equipped!
The party defeated Goblin.
Trap! Elrond takes 5 damage!
The party opened a treasure chest and found 19 gold and Healing Herb.
Stairs up! Press ESC to leave.
The party defeated Shadow Vanguard.
-- Ancient Battlefield --
Rusted swords and broken shields litter the ground between bleached bones. The grass grows thicker here, fed by old blood.
Among the bones you find a tarnished shield bearing an unfamiliar crest, and a journal wrapped in oilcloth.
Ancient Battlefield
Welcome to Ashford!
You descend into Iron Lair - Floor 1... No torch equipped!
Merry failed to pick the lock. (9 picks left)
Merry failed to pick the lock. (8 picks left)
Merry picked the lock! (7 picks left)
The party defeated Goblin.
Found the Sapphire Key! A portal appears!
The portal returns you to the surface!
The party defeated Orc War Host.
Welcome to Ashford!
Elder Sybil: You recovered the Sapphire Key! Here is 150 gold for your bravery!
Pella: I shouldn't say this, but... something's been poisoning our well water.
Pella: A cursed relic in the ruins nearby is the source. Can you recover it before it's too late?
Pella: Thank you! I've marked a suspicious location on your map. Be careful down there!
You descend into The Cursed Relic - Level 1... No torch equipped!
The party defeated Goblin Squatters.
Merry picked the lock! (6 picks left)
The party defeated Undead Horde.
Merry picked the lock! (5 picks left)
The party opened a treasure chest and found 8 gold.
You descend deeper... (Floor 2/2)
Merry failed to pick the lock. (4 picks left)
Merry failed to pick the lock. (3 picks left)
Merry failed to pick the lock. (2 picks left)
Merry picked the lock! (1 picks left)
The party opened a treasure chest and found 6 gold and Sword.
Found the Cursed Relic! A portal appears!
The party defeated Mixed Patrol.
Selina reached Level 2! HP+6 MP+14
The portal returns you to the surface!
-- Hermit's Camp --
A crude lean-to shelter beside a smouldering fire. Animal bones hang from strings. Someone lives here, barely.
A wild-eyed old man peers at you from behind a tree. 'You seek the Shadow? Fool. But I can help... for a price.'
Hermit's Camp
Welcome to Ashford!
Elder Sybil: You carry the look of adventurers. Good -- we need heroes.
Elder Sybil: Our scouts report growing dangers in every direction.
Pella: The Cursed Relic is safely contained. The well water is already clearing up!
